cases.note: bounded Sudoku backtracking with branch-level contradiction handling
small verifier-guided branch search with a narrow frontier budget
long-horizon carried-state control with later-window drift and partial correction
byte-addressed mutation loop where bad writes remain replay-visible and rewindable

catalog_contract.claim_boundary: this contract defines one bounded error-regime catalog over declared workloads, correction surfaces, and regime classes. It keeps checkpoint, verifier, and correction claims explicit instead of treating recovery machinery as general exactness proof

runtime_receipts.claim_boundary: this receipt records one bounded injected-error study cell with explicit correction surfaces, budgets, and final regime class. It does not treat the presence of a correction path as proof of exactness outside the seeded workloads and assumptions
runtime_receipts.note: Sudoku backtracking degrades without explicit correction, but the bounded trace family avoids immediate catastrophic divergence on the seeded case.
